THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, KRISTEN $22,914.25 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,914.25, IT IS ALSO ORDERED THAT WELLS FARGO BANK IS THE LIENHOLDER ON THE 1997 LAND ROVER, VEHICLE NO.
